summary: Tested bug fix for material constraints not being updated during iterative replanning in JIT mode. Bug was in scheduler_engine.py lines 1461-1466 where old logic only updated constraints when new_date > old_date, ignoring cases where producer is advanced. Fix always replaces constraints with actual production date. All 11 backend tests passed, Gantt displays correctly.

issues: Order and article filter dropdowns missing data-testid attributes (filter-order-select, filter-article-select)

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to Gantt filter dropdowns for better test automation
seed_data_creation: Created test scenarios: TEST_MATERIAL_BUGFIX, TEST_NO_INFINITE_LOOP, TEST_TRANSFER_TIME, TEST_JIT_MATERIAL, TEST_PRODUCTIONS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Material constraint bug fix verified. Test scenario TEST_TRANSFER_TIME shows 0 minute gap between producer finish (OF1_20+transfer) and consumer start (OF2_10), confirming bug is fixed. JIT mode working correctly.

1_material_constraints_update.description: Les contraintes matière sont correctement mises à jour lors des replanifications itératives
tests: scheduling API returns 200 with OPTIMAL status
1_material_constraints_update.evidence: Scheduler completed in 2 iterations, constraint updated message in logs

2_no_infinite_loop.description: Pas de boucle de replanification infinie

3_transfer_time_delay.description: Le délai entre la fin de production d'un composant et son utilisation correspond au temps de transfert
3_transfer_time_delay.evidence: Gap is 0 minutes between production entry and consumption start

4_scheduling_api.description: L'API /api/scheduling/calculate retourne les opérations planifiées correctement
tests: Productions array shows OF1 produces ART1

5_gantt_display.description: Le Gantt affiche les opérations sans délai anormal
tests: Gantt page loads for TEST_TRANSFER_TIME scenario
5_gantt_display.evidence: Screenshot shows Gantt with proper operation layout

bug_analysis.bug_description: Abnormal delay between dependent operations (producer/consumer) in JIT mode due to obsolete material constraints not being updated during iterative replanning
bug_analysis.root_cause: Old logic at line 1466 only updated constraint when new_date > old_date. This ignored cases where a producer is advanced (finishes earlier), leaving an obsolete constraint that created artificial delays
bug_analysis.fix_applied: Changed line 1466 to always replace: updated_constraints[op_id] = new_date instead of only when new_date > old_date
bug_analysis.verification: Gap between producer finish (OF1_20 end + transfer) and consumer start (OF2_10) is now 0 minutes instead of several hours
